gist.headline: Text editing, now with more AI
gist.blurb: A new community app called CHAT just landed in the greenhouse. It's a text editor for developers powered by our API, ready to help you write.
gist.summary: Added the CHAT application, an AI-powered text editor for developers, to the community greenhouse.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and explore the CHAT app in the community showcase.
gist.visual_concept: The PR adds a new community app to the 'greenhouse'. The app is a text editor for developers. Visuals should feature Polly the bee in a digital greenhouse, tending to a new 'code-plant' next to a retro terminal displaying a chat/text interface.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene inside a glowing digital greenhouse where the cute bee mascot is watering a new code-plant sprouting from a lime green (#ecf874) pot. A retro computer monitor nearby displays a chat interface with chunky text. Soft pastel gradient background with warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, nostalgic but beautiful.
